tasks.subject: DG-T1: isUnreconciledIdle predicate + DRAIN_DISK_RECOUNT flag (drainGuard.ts, TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure predicate detecting idle-but-unreconciled wedge + default-on kill-switch resolver, unit-tested.

**Files:** Modify crawler/src/drainGuard.ts + crawler/src/drainGuard.test.ts

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsx@4 --test src/drainGuard.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/drainGuard.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/drainGuard.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsx@4 --test src/drainGuard.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isUnreconciledIdle correct for 0/0/1 and negatives", "resolveDrainDiskRecount default-on only 'false' disables", "tsc clean + tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: DG-T2: wire disk-confirm drain path into queue-stats interval (main.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** In the 30s interval, after the unchanged isDrainedSample fast-path, add the gated disk-confirm path: isUnreconciledIdle ~90s -> recountQueueFromDisk -> abort iff disk-drained.

**Files:** Modify crawler/src/main.ts (imports ~52-53; interval 736-776)

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["imports + wedgeSuspectCount added", "gated disk-confirm path aborts only on diskDrained, shares latch", "tsc clean"]}
```
